title: Samsung Health's New AI Chatbot Aims to Make Your Metrics Easier to Understand
summary: The Health Assistant will “empower them to ask questions about their health and gain access to rich, personalized health guidance and recommendations.” To respond to queries, the Health Assistant draws on users’ sleep, activity, nutrition, mindfulness, and vital data from their Galaxy…
